patch.value: suggest-semver computed over all items not visible release sections (GH #28)
With --changelog-json + --limit/--since-version, suggestSemver recomputes over filterItems(options) not visible sections. Fix: compute from visible release-section items. pm-cli PR #108 review.

value.author: codex
value.text: Fixed: added visibleChangelogItems(options) (filter→buildSections→prune empty→limitSections→flatMap) + suggestSemverForItems(items). suggestSemver(options) now classifies visible items (identical to filterItems when no --limit/--since-version). buildChangelogDocument reuses its local visibleSections. Unit tests: breaking item in hidden v1.0.0 + feature in visible v2.0.0 → --limit 1/--since-version 2.0.0 ⇒ minor/breaking:0; no limit ⇒ major/breaking:1. 85 tests pass, default output byte-identical.
